name: Donkey Kong
description:
Donkey Kong is an early example of the platformer genre. The game features a carpenter named Mario who must rescue a damsel in distress, Pauline, from a giant ape named Donkey Kong. Donkey Kong has climbed to the top of a construction site, which comprises multiple distinct levels arranged vertically. Mario must navigate these levels, climbing ladders and jumping over obstacles to reach Donkey Kong and rescue Pauline. 

The levels feature various hazards, including barrels that Donkey Kong throws down towards Mario, oil drums that Mario must avoid or jump over, and fireballs that move along platforms. Mario can collect power-ups such as hammers to temporarily defeat or destroy the barrels. The levels increase in difficulty as the game progresses. 

Each level is cleared when Mario reaches the top and confronts Donkey Kong, scoring points along the way. Failing to avoid the obstacles or falling from a great height will result in Mario losing a life. The game ends when Mario runs out of lives.
